dependency_notes: Phase A (S1-S6, shipped) + Phase B (S7-S9, unblocked 2026-07-06 - ink published visuals-v0.1.2). Sequential dependency chain for S1-S6: S1 (schema) gates everything; S2 (adapter+stub) depends on S1's DynamicElement/StyleToken types; S3 (hook+Layout swap) depends on S2's DYNAMIC_GENERATORS registry; S4 (scrim) and S5 (worker offload) both depend on S3 and are independent of each other; S6 (mocked-generator test suite) depends on S1-S5 all landing, since it closes out comprehensive behavioral coverage across all five. Phase B is strictly sequential per architecture.md's Phase B Story Order: S7 (wire the real @rotheric/visuals git dependency, pinned to visuals-v0.1.2) must land before S8 can capture a real static-fallback render or tune a real style token; S9's perf measurement is meaningless without S8's actual theme to measure. No parallel opportunity within S7-S9, and no dependency of S7-S9 on S1-S6 beyond consuming the seams S1-S3 already produced. Stories are implemented sequentially, not in parallel (per commands/feature.md 'Design priorities and non-goals') - owning_module is a correctness/verticalization boundary, not a concurrency license.
mock_resolution_plan: S2 introduced MOCK-02-001 (the stub watercolor generator standing in for @rotheric/visuals). It is resolved by S7 (Phase B, wire the real @rotheric/visuals git dependency pinned to visuals-v0.1.2), which replaces the stub import in dynamicVisuals.ts without changing DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor's exported signature. Tracked in specs/epic-dynamic-theme-visuals/mocks-registry.json; all_resolved flips to true once S7 lands (S7 is 'pending' as of this stories.json update, so the registry file itself is left untouched here - the implementing story updates it on completion, per this epic's established Phase A convention).

stories.name: dynamic-element-schema-validation-gate
stories.title: Dynamic-element schema + validation gate
stories.description: Add an optional treatments.dynamic map ({ banner?, background? }) of .strict() DynamicElement objects ({ generator, style, clip?, render? }) plus the StyleToken shape ({ anchorHue, scheme, saturation, lightness }) to ThemeManifestSchema in schema.ts, with the generator enum declared inline (not imported) per the existing ElevationNameSchema convention. Join the closed generator-catalog check and the style-token bounds check to the vitest validation gate. treatments.banner stays required on every manifest, including ones that also declare a dynamic banner. A manifest without treatments.dynamic must validate and render exactly as today.

includes: app/src/themes/schema.ts - add treatments.dynamic map, StyleToken, DynamicElement, inline generator enum, all .strict()

app/tests/unit/themes-validation.test.ts - add describe('AC-STRUCT-1'), describe('AC-STRUCT-2'), describe('AC-VAL-1'), describe('AC-VAL-2'), describe('AC-BOUND-1') blocks, and an enum-catalog-schema-treatment-sync describe block for the generator enum mirroring the existing pattern at lines 732-765
excludes: app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts (S2's adapter file - not touched here)
any theme manifest (aquarelle is Phase B / S8, out of scope)
the single-import-site scanner for dynamicVisuals.ts (AC-STRUCT-4, owned by S2 since the adapter doesn't exist yet)

stories.notes: Foundation story; gates S2 and (transitively) S3-S6. Produces the DynamicElement/StyleToken seam contract. No dependency on any other Phase-A story.

stories.name: dynamic-visuals-adapter-registry-stub
stories.title: Generator adapter + registry + stub
stories.description: Create app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts exporting a name->function registry DYNAMIC_GENERATORS with a watercolor entry of signature (style, kind, render?) -> string. The watercolor entry owns the randomizeParams()+style-override call shape, forces the element's size/format, and returns a self-contained SVG string. In Phase A this is backed by a stub generator (MOCK-02-001) standing in for @ink/visuals, which must itself vary its output per call. This file is the ONLY module in app/src permitted a runtime import of the generator/stub (single-import-site invariant).

includes: app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts (NEW) - DYNAMIC_GENERATORS registry, watercolor entry, stub generator behind the real import seam

app/tests/unit/themes/treatments.test.ts - add a sibling describe('themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals') block (precedent: existing elevation/iconSets/patterns describe blocks) covering AC-STRUCT-3 (registry shape), AC-UX-1 (two calls differ, pinned style holds), AC-STRUCT-6 (self-contained output: no <script>, no external href/url())

app/tests/unit/themes-validation.test.ts - add the single-import-site scanner test for AC-STRUCT-4, reusing the resolved-import-scanner pattern already used for the zod boundary at lines 443-731, retargeted at dynamicVisuals.ts's absolute path
excludes: the real @ink/visuals git dependency (Phase B / S7 - stub only in Phase A)
app/src/hooks/useDynamicBanner.ts (S3 - this story only produces the registry the hook will call)

introduces_mocks.description: Stub watercolor generator standing in for the real @ink/visuals git dependency. Returns a valid, self-contained placeholder SVG that varies its output per call (to exercise AC-UX-1's non-determinism contract) while honoring the pinned StyleToken.
introduces_mocks.interface_mocked: DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor(style, kind, render?) => string, as it will be satisfied by @ink/visuals's renderSVG API in Phase B

stories.notes: Depends on S1 (consumes the StyleToken/DynamicElement types). Produces the DYNAMIC_GENERATORS seam consumed by S3 and (for off-thread wrapping) S5. MOCK-02-001 remains unresolved until Phase B's S7, which is out of scope for this run.

stories.name: use-dynamic-banner-hook-layout-swap
stories.title: useDynamicBanner hook + Layout swap
stories.description: Add a client-only (post-hydration, useEffect) useDynamicBanner(definition) hook that, when treatments.dynamic?.banner is present, generates a fresh SVG via DYNAMIC_GENERATORS, encodes it as a data-URI exactly as navBannerDecor does (URL-encoded, on the raw style prop, never folded into boxProps), and swaps bannerDecorStyle.style.backgroundImage. When absent, the static banner renders unchanged. Because this repo has no jsdom/React Testing Library, all decision logic lives in an exported pure function (resolveDynamicBannerStyle(definition, generatedSvg | null)) that the thin hook wraps - mirroring the computeThemeStyles()/useThemeStyles() split. On a fresh mount the background changes from the static fallback to a generated data-URI SVG, and differs across two mounts. If generation fails (throws, or the Worker errors with no fallback success), the hook keeps/reverts to the static bannerDecorStyle and never throws uncaught. computeThemeStyles() and useThemeStyles.ts are explicitly NOT modified. Layout.tsx reserves the banner box at its fixed dimensions and cross-fades the generated image over the static one (no layout shift) - legibility scrim rendering itself is S4's concern.

includes: app/src/hooks/useDynamicBanner.ts (NEW) - thin useEffect/useState wrapper + exported pure resolveDynamicBannerStyle(definition, generatedSvg | null) decision function
app/src/components/Layout.tsx - call useDynamicBanner alongside useThemeStyles(); reserve the banner box at fixed dimensions; cross-fade the generated image over the static one

app/tests/unit/hooks/useDynamicBanner.test.ts (NEW) - describe('AC-STRUCT-5'), describe('AC-UX-2'), describe('AC-UX-3'), describe('AC-UX-3a'), describe('AC-PERF-1') blocks against resolveDynamicBannerStyle directly (never a rendered/mounted hook), passing two distinct generated strings to exercise the swap/per-mount difference and generatedSvg = null to exercise the static/failure path
excludes: app/src/hooks/useThemeStyles.ts (explicitly untouched by this epic - Boundary Rule 5)
legibility scrim rendering behind the logo (S4)
Web Worker / requestIdleCallback wiring for the generation call itself (S5 - S3's hook calls the generator directly; S5 swaps that call path to go off-thread)

stories.notes: Depends on S2 (calls DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor) and transitively S1. Produces the ResolveDynamicBannerStyleReturn seam consumed by S4 (scrim gating) and by Layout.tsx generally. Gates S4 and S5, which have no dependency on each other once S3 lands.

stories.name: legibility-scrim
stories.title: Legibility scrim
stories.description: Add a scrim/backing behind the nav logo in Layout.tsx that guarantees the brand.500 logo text meets WCAG AA (>= 4.5:1) contrast regardless of the banner content behind it, reusing contrast.ts's wcagRatio(hexA, hexB) primitive directly (evaluateThemeContrast() is not reusable here - it takes a ThemeManifest, not arbitrary colors) at the existing WCAG_AA_THRESHOLD = 4.5. The scrim is present whenever a dynamic banner is active and must not visually regress themes using only a static banner (no scrim required, or a no-op). Exposed as an exported pure decision function (e.g. shouldRenderScrim(hasDynamicBanner: boolean): boolean), following the same no-jsdom pure-function testing convention as S3's hook.

includes: app/src/components/Layout.tsx - render the legibility scrim behind the nav logo
app/src/hooks/useDynamicBanner.ts - add exported shouldRenderScrim(hasDynamicBanner: boolean): boolean pure decision function, co-located with resolveDynamicBannerStyle
app/tests/unit/hooks/useDynamicBanner.test.ts - add describe('AC-A11Y-1'), describe('AC-A11Y-2') blocks asserting scrim + brand.500 contrast via wcagRatio, independent of any generated image
excludes: app/src/themes/contrast.ts (read-only reuse of wcagRatio - no changes expected)
worker offload (S5)

stories.notes: Depends on S3 (needs hasDynamicBanner / the banner box wired into Layout.tsx). Independent of S5 - both can proceed once S3 lands, per architecture.md's Story Order.

stories.name: worker-offload
stories.title: Worker offload
stories.description: Run banner generation off the main thread via a Web Worker (app/src/workers/banner.worker.ts, using Next.js's built-in new Worker(new URL(...)) native ESM pattern - genuinely greenfield, zero existing Worker usage in this repo), postMessage-ing the generated SVG string back to useDynamicBanner. Provide a requestIdleCallback (or equivalent deferred) main-thread fallback if worker bundling under output: 'export' proves fussy. Generation must not block first paint. banner.worker.ts is a pure message-passing wrapper carrying no state of its own - it wraps dynamicVisuals's DYNAMIC_GENERATORS call, it does not duplicate it.

includes: app/src/workers/banner.worker.ts (NEW) - postMessage wrapper around DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor
app/src/hooks/useDynamicBanner.ts - wire the Worker + requestIdleCallback fallback into the generation call path (swapping the direct S3 call for the off-thread path)

app/tests/unit/hooks/useDynamicBanner.test.ts - add describe('AC-PERF-2') covering the worker/idle-callback mechanism only (no real Worker-thread mocking infrastructure exists in this repo; real off-thread execution is a Phase B / manual-verification concern per architecture.md's Implementation Constraints)
excludes: real off-thread execution timing/paint measurement (AC-PERF-3, Phase B / S9)

app/next.config.mjs webpack changes, unless worker bundling under output: 'export' genuinely requires a carve-out (fallback to requestIdleCallback is the spec's own acknowledged non-blocking escape hatch first)

stories.notes: Depends on S3 (extends the hook's generation call path). Independent of S4. Carries the spec's own acknowledged worker-bundling risk (no precedent in this repo), not a new risk introduced here.

stories.name: mocked-generator-test-suite
stories.title: Tests (mocked generator)
stories.description: Close out comprehensive behavioral coverage of the dynamic-banner mechanism across S1-S5 in the mocked-generator test suite: assert the static fallback renders when JS/dynamic is unavailable (no-JS path shows a correct image); assert that on mount the background swaps to a valid data-URI SVG (parses as SVG string-match: contains a viewBox, no <script>); and confirm there is no per-seed determinism test anywhere in the suite (non-determinism is intended - the suite mocks the generator for speed and asserts behaviour, not pixels). This story is test-only; it introduces no production code.

includes: app/tests/unit/hooks/useDynamicBanner.test.ts - add describe('AC-UX-4'), describe('AC-UX-5') blocks against resolveDynamicBannerStyle (same pure-function boundary as S3/S4/S5's tests, no rendered/mounted hook); add or confirm an describe('AC-META-1') assertion (e.g. a suite-level check/comment convention) that no test asserts on a fixed seed/pixel output
excludes: any production code change (test-only story)
per-seed determinism tests of any kind (explicitly excluded by AC-META-1)
real CLS/paint-timing measurement (AC-PERF-3, Phase B)

stories.notes: Depends on S1-S5 all landing - it is the capstone story closing out full behavioral coverage of the mocked-generator suite (spec.md §7's S6 description: 'Fallback renders; on mount the background swaps to a valid data-URI SVG; scrim guarantees logo contrast; adapter output is self-contained. No per-seed determinism tests.'). AC-STRUCT-6 (self-containment), AC-A11Y-1/2 (scrim), AC-UX-3a/AC-PERF-1/AC-PERF-2 (fail-soft, layout-shift mechanism, worker mechanism) are implemented and given their own initial tests by S2/S4/S3/S5 respectively as each module lands; S6 is the final pass ensuring AC-UX-4, AC-UX-5, and the AC-META-1 no-per-seed-determinism convention are in place across the whole suite.

stories.name: wire-real-visuals-git-dependency
stories.title: Wire the real @rotheric/visuals git dependency
stories.description: Replace dynamicVisuals.ts's stub watercolor generator (MOCK-02-001) with a real import of the @rotheric/visuals package, added to app/package.json as a git dependency pinned to the visuals-v0.1.2 tag. DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor's exported signature and call shape MUST NOT change - only the import line and package.json's git dependency entry change (the seam held). Confirm the package bundles cleanly under output: 'export' (ESM), is usable from the Web Worker (app/src/workers/banner.worker.ts, unchanged), and that the production client bundle does not pull sharp or any Node-only dependency. Re-run the AC-UX-1 non-determinism check and the AC-STRUCT-4 single-import-site scanner against the real import instead of the stub.

includes: app/package.json - add @rotheric/visuals as a git dependency pinned to the visuals-v0.1.2 tag

app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts - swap the stub import for the real @rotheric/visuals renderSVG call; DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor's exported signature and downstream call shape stay unchanged
app/tests/unit/themes/treatments.test.ts - re-run/confirm the existing describe('themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals') block (AC-UX-1, AC-STRUCT-6) against the real import
app/tests/unit/themes-validation.test.ts - re-run the single-import-site scanner (AC-STRUCT-4) against the real @rotheric/visuals import specifier
confirm Web Worker consumption (app/src/workers/banner.worker.ts) still works unchanged against the real import (no code change expected there, per the seam holding)
excludes: app/src/themes/aquarelle/ (S8 - the new theme folder itself)
real device / CLS / paint-timing measurement (AC-PERF-3, S9)
tuning the aquarelle style token or capturing its static fallback (S8)

stories.notes: Depends on S1/S2 (DynamicElement, DYNAMIC_GENERATORS) already landed in Phase A. Resolves MOCK-02-001 - the Phase A stub introduced by S2, standing in for @rotheric/visuals; once this story lands the mock is fully resolved (mocks-registry.json's all_resolved flips to true as part of this story's completion, per the established Phase A convention of the implementing story updating the registry). Gates S8 (aquarelle needs the real package wired before it can capture a static-fallback render or tune a real style token) and S9 (perf measurement is meaningless without S8's actual theme). Strictly sequential per architecture.md's Phase B Story Order - no parallel opportunity with S8/S9.

stories.name: aquarelle-theme
stories.title: The aquarelle theme
stories.description: Add a brand-new light theme folder, app/src/themes/aquarelle/manifest.ts (not derived from an existing theme), declaring treatments.dynamic.banner with a tuned StyleToken (within S1's bounds: anchorHue 0-359, scheme enum, saturation 20-100, lightness 20-75) and a frozen static banner fallback captured from one real @rotheric/visuals generator run (post-S7). The theme MUST be auto-detected by the existing folder-name-driven registry (app/scripts/generate-theme-registry.mjs) with no edits to any shared file beyond what S1 already added. aquarelle MUST pass the existing WCAG contrast gate on its static palette and ships status: 'experimental' until S9 clears AC-PERF-3. With aquarelle active, reloading the page MUST show a visibly different banner every time, all recognizably the same theme (fixed colour identity), with the logo remaining legible (AC-A11Y-1) on every render.

includes: app/src/themes/aquarelle/manifest.ts (NEW) - brand-new light theme, treatments.dynamic.banner with a tuned style token, frozen static banner fallback, status: 'experimental'
any co-located static-fallback asset following the existing per-theme folder precedent (e.g. app/src/themes/aquarelle/ static SVG capture)
capture the frozen static fallback from one real generator run (post-S7) using the same StyleToken pinned in the manifest
confirm aquarelle is picked up by app/scripts/generate-theme-registry.mjs's folder-name-driven registry with zero shared-file edits beyond S1's schema addition
app/tests/unit/themes-validation.test.ts and/or the theme-registry test path - confirm aquarelle passes the existing WCAG contrast gate on its static palette
excludes: app/src/themes/schema.ts and any other shared file (no shared-file edits beyond S1's already-landed capability)
app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts (S7 - real package wiring, not touched here)
flipping status from 'experimental' to stable, and finalizing the render lite-preset knob values (S9 - gated on AC-PERF-3)
dark-theme variants (v2 / S10, out of scope)

stories.notes: Depends on S7 (needs the real @rotheric/visuals package wired to capture an authentic static fallback and tune a real style token - captured renders must come from the real generator, not the stub). Ships status: 'experimental'; S9 measures before promotion. No shared-file edits beyond S1's schema addition (architecture.md Module Map). Strictly sequential after S7 per architecture.md's Phase B Story Order.

stories.name: performance-validation
stories.title: Performance validation
stories.description: Measure real @rotheric/visuals banner generation + paint cost on a low-end mobile profile against aquarelle's actual output (not the stub). Finalize the concrete render lite-preset knob values (previously left as a z.record escape hatch per architecture.md's Open Questions), targeting ~6 paths and ~8-15 KB SVG; confirm generation stays off-thread with no dropped frames on the nav; confirm no CLS attributable to the banner under real timing. Flip aquarelle's status field from 'experimental' once the budget is measured green. No new files or modules are introduced - this story touches only app/src/themes/aquarelle/manifest.ts's status and render knob fields.

includes: app/src/themes/aquarelle/manifest.ts - finalize render knob values (targeting ~6 paths, ~8-15 KB SVG) and flip status from 'experimental' once AC-PERF-3 is measured green

real-device / low-end-mobile-profile measurement of generation + paint cost (manual/instrumented validation, per architecture.md's Open Questions - the concrete render preset is only knowable once real perf measurement is in hand)
confirm no dropped frames on the nav and no CLS attributable to the banner under real (non-stub) generation timing
excludes: any new module or file (architecture.md: 'S9, no new module')
wiring the real package itself (S7) or authoring the theme (S8)
dark-theme / v2 work (S10, out of scope)

stories.notes: Depends on S8 (aquarelle must exist to measure real output) and transitively S7. Resolves the open render-knob-tuning question flagged in architecture.md's Open Questions / Accepted Risks. Capstone of Phase B - once green, aquarelle promotes out of experimental and the epic's Definition of Done (spec.md §8) is satisfied for v1.

seams.data: DynamicElement / StyleToken shape - the manifest's optional treatments.dynamic.banner declaration

intermediaries.artifact: app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts (consumes StyleToken's field types for the randomizeParams+override call)

destination.artifact: app/src/hooks/useDynamicBanner.ts (reads definition.treatments.dynamic?.banner to decide whether/how to generate)

fields.name: style
fields.type: StyleToken { anchorHue: 0-359, scheme: enum, saturation: 20-100, lightness: 20-75 }

fields.name: render
fields.type: Record<string, unknown> (perf-knob escape hatch, z.record precedent)

invariants: an unknown generator value fails the build (AC-VAL-1)
style.saturation is within 20-100, style.lightness within 20-75, style.anchorHue within 0-359, style.scheme is one of the enum members, or validation fails (AC-VAL-2)
a manifest without treatments.dynamic validates and renders exactly as today (AC-STRUCT-1)
treatments.banner remains required even when treatments.dynamic.banner is present (AC-STRUCT-2)

seams.data: DYNAMIC_GENERATORS registry - the name->function map the hook (and, off-thread, the worker) calls to produce a fresh SVG string

intermediaries.artifact: app/src/workers/banner.worker.ts (wraps the watercolor call for the off-thread path; postMessage's the string back)

destination.artifact: app/src/hooks/useDynamicBanner.ts (invokes DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor directly on main thread, or via the S5 worker/idle-callback path once wired)

fields.name: watercolor
fields.type: (style: StyleToken, kind: 'banner', render?: Record<string, unknown>) => string

invariants: two successive calls return different svg strings while both reflect the pinned style identity (AC-UX-1)
the returned string is self-contained: no <script>, no external href/url() references to outside resources (AC-STRUCT-6)
dynamicVisuals.ts is the only module in app/src that imports the underlying generator/stub (AC-STRUCT-4)

seams.data: resolveDynamicBannerStyle return - the swapped style state Layout.tsx and the scrim decision key off

destination.artifact: app/src/components/Layout.tsx / shouldRenderScrim(hasDynamicBanner) - scrim rendering keyed off dynamic-banner presence

fields.name: backgroundImage
fields.type: string (data-URI, either the static bannerDecorStyle value or a freshly generated SVG, URL-encoded exactly as navBannerDecor does)

invariants: when treatments.dynamic?.banner is absent, backgroundImage equals the static bannerDecorStyle value unchanged (AC-UX-2)
when present, backgroundImage is swapped to a fresh generated data-URI on mount and differs across two mounts (AC-UX-3)
when generation fails (generatedSvg is null / the generator threw), backgroundImage keeps/reverts to the static value and the function never throws uncaught (AC-UX-3a)
hasDynamicBanner is what shouldRenderScrim(hasDynamicBanner) keys the scrim-presence decision off (AC-A11Y-2)

source.artifact: @rotheric/visuals's renderSVG({ params }) API (external git dependency, pinned to the visuals-v0.1.2 tag)

fields.name: svg
fields.type: string (self-contained: no <script>, no external href/url() references)

invariants: DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor's exported signature and downstream call shape are unchanged after the swap (AC-DEP-1)
the package bundles cleanly under output: 'export' (ESM) and is Worker-safe; the production client bundle does not pull sharp or any Node-only dependency (AC-DEP-2)

two successive calls continue to return different svg strings while reflecting the pinned style identity - re-affirms AC-UX-1 against the real package, per architecture.md's DYNAMIC_GENERATORS seam note

seams.data: aquarelle theme's treatments.dynamic.banner declaration - the first real-world consumer of the DynamicElement/DYNAMIC_GENERATORS seam end-to-end, and the input S9 measures

source.artifact: app/src/themes/schema.ts#DynamicElement (same contract as the DynamicElement seam above)

intermediaries.artifact: app/src/hooks/useDynamicBanner.ts (generates + swaps the banner at runtime for the active theme)

fields.name: style
fields.type: StyleToken tuned for aquarelle, within S1's bounds (anchorHue 0-359, scheme enum, saturation 20-100, lightness 20-75)
